typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ExecutionFlag as integer (),
	StageViewCount as integer (),
	Variable as integer (),
	Variable1 as string ()
}

source(output(
		UID as string,
		DB_ID as long,
		ValidatedDate as date
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'Declare @inspectiondate date = (select max(import_date) from [tbl_Prisma_Enriched_TCOO_TDATA] ) Declare @PrevDate date = (select max(import_date) from [tbl_Prisma_Enriched_TCOO_TDATA] where Import_Date <@inspectiondate) select  A.UID, A.[DB_ID], @inspectiondate as ValidatedDate from  [dbo].[tbl_Prisma_Enriched_TCOO_TDATA] a left outer join [tbl_Prisma_Enriched_TCOO_TDATA]  b on a.UID = B.UID AND B.IMPORT_DATE = @inspectiondate where cast(A.import_date as date) = @PrevDate AND B.UID IS NULL',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> tblPrismaEnrichedTCOOTDATA
tblPrismaEnrichedTCOOTDATA sink(input(
		UID as string,
		DB_ID as long,
		ValidatedDate as date 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		UID,
		DB_ID,
		ValidatedDate)) ~> OLEDBDestination
